spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency management for spring-data-rest-hal-browser to resolve version conflicts in the new Spring Boot ecosystem.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for more concise string interpolation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.before:
return String.format(
			"Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]", id, name,

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for cleaner syntax.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.before:
return String.format(
			"Student [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, courses=%s]", id,

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove unused Spring Test JUnit 4 runner import.
Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the JUnit 5 API; using them in a JUnit 5 context is deprecated and may fail if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 @Test annotation to JUnit 5 Jupiter @Test annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 @Test is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine without the vintage engine, and the project is moving to pure JUnit 5.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner dependency and annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not use @RunWith; keeping it causes confusion or errors if the vintage engine is not present.
SpringRunner is a JUnit 4 runner; it is unnecessary and potentially conflicting in a JUnit 5 environment.
